creator: test@a6k.de
text:
Patch Nr. 4 was working for me.
For some unknown reason the patch.txt-link was not working with =
Safari-Webbrowser. I had to copy/paste the patch manually.
And the www/davical/Makefile i had to edit manually too, cause patch < =
patch.txt can't use my paste correctly.
But the patch updated my 0.9.7.6 to 0.9.8.1 and davical is now running =
on my FreeBSD 7.2.

thx,
Andreas=
